mapper.insert: INSERT INTO counselor_student (cou_id, stu_id, start_date, end_date, is_primary) VALUES (#{couId}, #{stuId}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{isPrimary})
mapper.select: SELECT id, cou_id, stu_id, start_date, end_date, is_primary, create_time, update_time FROM counselor_student WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT cs.id AS relationId, cs.cou_id AS couId, cs.stu_id AS stuId, cs.start_date AS startDate, cs.end_date AS endDate, cs.is_primary AS isPrimary, s.student_no AS studentNo, s.user_id AS userId, up.name AS studentName, up.gender, c.college_name AS collegeName, m.major_name AS majorName, cl.class_name AS className, cl.grade FROM counselor_student cs JOIN student s ON cs.stu_id = s.id LEFT JOIN user_profile up ON s.user_id = up.user_id LEFT JOIN college c ON s.college_id = c.id LEFT JOIN major m ON s.major_id = m.id LEFT JOIN class cl ON s.class_id = cl.id WHERE cs.cou_id = #{couId} ORDER BY cs.start_date DESC

SELECT cs.id AS relationId, cs.cou_id AS couId, cs.stu_id AS stuId, cs.start_date AS startDate, cs.end_date AS endDate, cs.is_primary AS isPrimary, t.employee_no AS employeeNo, t.title, c.counselor_id AS counselorId, u.id AS userId, up.name AS counselorName, col.college_name AS collegeName FROM counselor_student cs JOIN counselor c ON cs.cou_id = c.id JOIN teacher t ON c.teacher_id = t.id LEFT JOIN user_profile up ON c.user_id = up.user_id LEFT JOIN college col ON t.college_id = col.id LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE cs.stu_id = #{stuId} ORDER BY cs.is_primary DESC, cs.start_date DESC

SELECT cs.id AS relationId, cs.cou_id AS couId, cs.stu_id AS stuId, cs.start_date AS startDate, cs.end_date AS endDate, cs.is_primary AS isPrimary, c.teacher_id AS teacherId, up_cou.name AS counselorName, s.student_no AS studentNo, up_stu.name AS studentName, up_stu.user_id AS studentUserId FROM counselor_student cs JOIN counselor c ON cs.cou_id = c.id JOIN student s ON cs.stu_id = s.id LEFT JOIN user_profile up_cou ON c.user_id = up_cou.user_id LEFT JOIN user_profile up_stu ON s.user_id = up_stu.user_id ORDER BY cs.create_time DESC
SELECT id, cou_id, stu_id, start_date, end_date, is_primary, create_time, update_time FROM counselor_student WHERE cou_id = #{couId} AND stu_id = #{stuId} AND end_date IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT stu_id FROM counselor_student WHERE cou_id = #{couId} AND end_date IS NULL
